generated_oml:
instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
  base:desc "Gantry crane base structure providing support for motion components."
]

instance CraneTrolley : DTDFVocab:Component [
  base:desc "Horizontal carriage platform that carries the hoist along the gantry rail."
]

instance CraneHoist : DTDFVocab:Component [
  base:desc "Vertical lifting mechanism that supports the load and is driven by the motor."
]

instance CraneMotionController : DTDFVocab:Component [
  base:desc "Embedded hardware controller managing crane motion and collecting state data."
]

instance LaboratoryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
  base:contains CraneFrame, CraneTrolley, CraneHoist, CraneMotionController
]

instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
  base:desc "Sensor capturing real‑time position data from the motion controller."
  DTDFVocab:producedData CranePositionData
]

instance CraneVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
  base:desc "Sensor capturing real‑time velocity data from the motion controller."
  DTDFVocab:producedData CraneVelocityData
]

instance CraneActuatorStatusSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
  base:desc "Sensor capturing actuator status (motor state, limit switch) from the motion controller."
  DTDFVocab:producedData CraneActuatorStatusData
]

instance CranePositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
  DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

instance CraneVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
  DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneVelocitySensor
]

instance CraneActuatorStatusData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
  DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneActuatorStatusSensor
]

instance CranePositionTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
  base:desc "Time‑series dataset of crane position stored in TimescaleDB."
  DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, CADModelEnabler
  DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionData
]

instance CraneVelocityTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
  base:desc "Time‑series dataset of crane velocity stored in TimescaleDB."
  DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
  DTDFVocab:fromData CraneVelocityData
]

instance CraneActuatorStatusTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
  base:desc "Time‑series dataset of crane actuator status stored in TimescaleDB."
  DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
  DTDFVocab:fromData CraneActuatorStatusData
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
  base:desc "Enabler that stores telemetry records in a TimescaleDB time‑series database."
  DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance CADModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
  base:desc "Enabler that provides the CAD model of the gantry crane for 3D visualization."
  DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance ValidationAlgorithmEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
  base:desc "Enabler that runs continuous validation algorithms to detect deviations from the physical system."
  DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance OptimalControlAlgorithmEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
  base:desc "Enabler that executes optimal control algorithms to compute actuator commands."
  DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance RuleBasedUpdateEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
  base:desc "Enabler that applies rule‑based updates for adaptive control decisions."
  DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
  base:desc "Service storing historical sensor and actuator data for traceability."
  DTDFVocab:provides LogHistoricalDataAction
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
  base:desc "Service rendering real‑time and historical crane states using the CAD model."
  DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
  base:desc "Service synchronizing the digital representation with the physical system and detecting faults."
  DTDFVocab:provides PhysicalModelDeviationsInsight, TriggerFaultAlertAction
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
  base:desc "Service calculating optimal control commands to achieve desired trajectories."
  DTDFVocab:provides ComputeControlCommandAction
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
  base:desc "Service applying rule‑based adaptive controls to maintain desired state."
  DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveControlDecisionAction
]

instance CranesPositionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
  base:desc "Insight representing the current position of the crane."
]

instance CraneVelocityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
  base:desc "Insight representing the current velocity of the crane."
]

instance CraneActuatorStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
  base:desc "Insight representing the current actuator status of the crane."
]

instance CraneStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
  base:desc "Insight providing the full state of the crane for visualization."
]

instance PhysicalModelDeviationsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
  base:desc "Insight indicating deviations between the virtual model and the physical crane."
]

instance LogHistoricalDataAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
  base:desc "Action that logs sensor data into TimescaleDB for historical analysis."
  DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ComputeControlCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
  base:desc "Action computing the optimal control command for the crane."
  DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TriggerFaultAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
  base:desc "Action triggering an alert when a fault or deviation is detected."
  DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdaptiveControlDecisionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
  base:desc "Action adjusting control parameters based on rule‑based adaptive decisions."
  DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Trajectory Generator Service produces optimal movement trajectories (position, velocity, acceleration profiles) that are consumed by the Control Application. The Control Application uses the Python Physical Crane Interface to publish command messages to the crane hardware controllers. Commands are in the form of high‑level motion primitives (e.g., move to point, set speed) and are sent over the same Python process that talks directly to the physical interface. Feedback from the physical crane (current state) is returned to the Logging Application for persistence and to the Simulation Service for validation. The Continuous Validation Service compares the executed trajectory with the simulated one and, if deviations exceed a threshold, notifies operators via the Dashboard."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The GreenhouseDT system orchestrates data flow across a middleware architecture composed of an ActiveMQ message broker that receives sensor events from the physical greenhouse; an InfluxDB time‑series database for persistent storage of sensor readings; virtual machine instances that host the digital twin simulation and adaptation logic; and containerized services (via Docker) for modular deployment and replication. Coordination between these layers is achieved through message queues and scheduled jobs, enabling the twin to process real‑time streams and prerecorded data for offline simulation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The digital twin communication backbone relies on an MQTT broker for inter‑service signaling (e.g., publish/subscribe of trajectory, telemetry, and validation events). The Logging Application and other services access the TimescaleDB database over standard PostgreSQL/TimescaleSQL connections (TCP). The network topology is a local area network with the services residing on separate containers or VMs, but all communication uses reliable TCP streams. Security protocols are not explicitly defined in the document; however, the typical MQTT connections are assumed to be over TLS, and database connections use password authentication."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration between the physical system, the digital twin, and external cloud services is achieved by using ActiveMQ as the inter‑component messaging backbone (AMQP/OpenWire) to stream sensor data from Raspberry‑Pi devices to the twin; the twin writes to InfluxDB, exposing data via its HTTP API; Microsoft Azure tools are employed to run the digital twin pipeline in the cloud; and AutomationML is used as the standardized description format for the twin to interoperate with other engineering tools. Standard HTTP/REST and AMQP communication patterns are used to integrate with enterprise systems."
]
